SEARCH
Module iu.util.crypt.cli
Package iu.crypt.cli

Class IuProcess

java.lang.Object
iu.crypt.cli.IuProcess
final class IuProcess extends Object
Simple utility for executing commands using the JVM process shell environment.

    • temp

      static <T> Path temp(BiConsumer<PrintStream,T> printHandle, T value)
      Writes a value to a temp file
      Type Parameters:
      T - value type
      Parameters:
      printHandle - method handle for writing the content using PrintStream
      value - value
      Returns:
      Path to the temp file

      key - PrivateKey
